pricing_tier.quote_span: Pricing for named user seats is tiered based on total active seats per month, as follows: 1 to 100 seats: $40.00 per seat per month; 101 to 300 seats: $34.00 per seat per month; 301 to 500 seats: $28.00 per seat per month

renewal_term.quote_span: This SOW shall commence on April 1, 2025 and continue for a fixed term of twelve (12) months, after which it shall expire. This SOW does not renew automatically; a new SOW must be executed for continued services.

msa_sow_linkage.order_of_precedence_note: In the event of a conflict between this SOW and the Agreement, the Agreement shall control except as to matters of scope and pricing specific to this SOW.
msa_sow_linkage.quote_span: This Statement of Work ("SOW") is issued pursuant to and governed by the Master Services Agreement dated March 3, 2025
